title: Wayback Machine CDX URL List Scraper

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

url.title: URL or domain
url.description: Domain or URL to look up in the Wayback Machine. Examples: `apify.com`, `example.com/blog`, `https://news.ycombinator.com`.
url.sectionDescription: Specify the URL and optional filters for the Wayback Machine CDX query.

matchType.title: Match type
matchType.description: How to match the URL: `exact` (exact URL only), `prefix` (URL plus all subpaths), `host` (entire host), or `domain` (host plus all subdomains).

fromDate.title: From date (YYYYMMDD)
fromDate.description: Earliest snapshot timestamp. Examples: `2020`, `202001`, `20200115`. Leave empty for the entire archive.

toDate.title: To date (YYYYMMDD)
toDate.description: Latest snapshot timestamp. Same format as From date.

statusCode.title: HTTP status code
statusCode.description: Restrict to a specific status code, e.g. `200`, `404`, `301`. Leave empty for all status codes.

mimeType.title: MIME type
mimeType.description: Filter by MIME type, e.g. `text/html`, `application/pdf`, `image/jpeg`. Leave empty for all.

collapse.title: Collapse duplicates
collapse.description: Collapse adjacent duplicate snapshots. Common values: `digest` (dedupe by content hash), `urlkey` (one entry per URL), `timestamp:6` (one per month).

uniqueOnly.title: Unique URLs only
uniqueOnly.description: When enabled, returns only the first snapshot per unique URL.
